label: API gateways, tool registries & secure connectors

node.label: API gateways, tool registries & secure connectors
node.definition: API gateways and tool registries authenticate requests, describe callable capabilities, validate arguments, enforce policy, and route agents to external services.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, API gateways, tool registries & secure connectors is modeled as depending on Caches, APIs & tool interfaces, External databases, APIs & live tools and feeding downstream nodes such as Conversational assistants & chatbots.

limitations: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Caches, APIs & tool interfaces, External databases, APIs & live tools.
